competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Cursor 3.1 Canvas (2026-04-16): AI agents generate persistent interactive React interfaces inside Agents Window — charts, tables, diff views, custom logic rendered live as agent works. Cursor 3 Agent-First Interface (2026-04-02): interface rewrite shifting center of gravity from text editor to Agents Window; launch and follow multiple agents in parallel across local environments, git worktrees, cloud sandboxes, remote SSH. Cloud Agents with Computer Use (2026-02-24): each agent gets full dev environment with desktop, browser, UI interaction; agents open browsers, navigate localhost, click UI elements, record video demos. Background Agents: 35% of Cursor's own internal merged PRs created by agents. Cursor SDK public beta (2026-04-29): TypeScript @cursor/sdk. Cursor in Jira (mid-2026): assign work items to Cursor, @Cursor in comments. Cursor Automations in Agents Window: configure automations with multiple repos. Enterprise (June 2026): manage multiple teams, separate budgets, security controls, Premium seat for heavy agent users.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Cursor 3.1 Canvas (2026-04-16): AI agents generate persistent interactive React interfaces inside Agents Window — charts, tables, diff views, c

changes.description: Cursor 3.1 Canvas：agent 在 Agents Window 内生成持久交互式 React 界面（图表、表格、diff 视图），live 渲染
changes.evidence: 「lets AI agents generate persistent, interactive React interfaces directly inside the Agents Window, creating actual charts, tables, diff views, and custom logic rendered live as the agent works」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：descriptive-first canvas，agent 实时构建可视化界面；锚点 #2：live 而非 snapshot

changes.description: Cursor 3 Agents Window 成为界面中心：人可同时跟踪/审批/重定向多个并行 agent
changes.evidence: 「interface rewrite that shifts the center of gravity from the text editor to the Agents Window, a dedicated view where the user can launch and follow several agents in parallel」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：人作为 agent 图内节点，可 approve/redirect；锚点 #5：单一面板跟踪多 session 状态

changes.description: Cloud Agents with Computer Use：每个 agent 拥有独立完整 dev 环境（桌面、浏览器、UI 交互），录制视频供 review
changes.evidence: 「giving each agent its own full development environment with a desktop, browser, and the ability to interact with UI elements. Agents can open browsers, navigate to localhost, click through UI elements, and verify their code changes work visually, recording video demos」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：独立 session 隔离环境，每 agent 一个 worktree/沙箱

changes.description: Cursor 进驻 Jira：可在 Jira 工单中 @Cursor 触发 cloud agent，完成后自动关联 PR
changes.evidence: 「Cursor became available in Jira, allowing users to assign work items to Cursor or mention @Cursor in a comment to kick off a cloud agent」

key_findings: Canvas 功能（3.1）使 agent 可在 Agents Window 内构建持久交互式 React 界面，与 meee2 descriptive canvas 锚点直接重叠
Cursor 3 Agents Window 成为产品重心，人可在其中并行管理多 agent 并审批/重定向工作
Cloud Agents with Computer Use：每 agent 独立沙箱 + 桌面 + 浏览器，内部 35% PR 已由 agent 创建

competitors.name: Claude.ai
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Live Artifacts (2026-04): dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them; stay connected to data sources — useful for KPI monitoring, pipeline tracking, content calendars without manual updates. Artifacts with persistent storage: save and retrieve data between sessions. Artifacts can call Claude's API directly — intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact. External Service Connections via MCP: artifacts can connect to Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and other external services. Community Catalog: browse and remix artifacts. Projects: persistent workspaces with 200K context window, uploaded files and custom instructions, ships on all paid plans.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Live Artifacts (2026-04): dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them; stay connected to data sources — us

changes.description: Live Artifacts：每次重开自动刷新当前数据，保持与数据源的持久连接，非 snapshot
changes.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：跨工具 artifact live link（不是 snapshot），与 meee2 核心差异化直接重叠

changes.description: Artifact 可调用 Claude API：变为智能 micro-app，AI 逻辑运行在 artifact 内部本身
changes.evidence: 「artifacts can call Claude's API directly, which turns them into intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact itself」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：artifact 本身具有描述性 + 可执行性，接近 descriptive canvas 范式

changes.description: Artifact 通过 MCP 连接外部服务（Google Calendar、Gmail、Slack）
changes.evidence: 「Through MCP integration, artifacts can connect to Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and other external services」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull，artifact 直接连通外部工具数据

key_findings: Live Artifacts 正式落地：保持与数据源连接、自动刷新，与 meee2「live link 非 snapshot」锚点直接竞争
Artifact 变为可调 Claude API 的智能 micro-app，进入 descriptive-first 范式

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot: Ship faster with AI that work alongside you. Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously in the background. Manage agent usage with enterprise-grade controls. Track activity with detailed audit logs and enforce governance by managing agents from a single control plane. Copilot Spaces: Turn Copilot into a project expert. Scale knowledge and keep teams consistent by creating a shared source of truth. Secure your MCP integrations. Control which MCP servers developers can access from their IDEs. [WebSearch supplement] GitHub Copilot App (2026-06-02 technical preview): My Work view — active sessions, issues, PRs, background automations across repos. Canvases: bidirectional work surfaces for humans and agents. Each session gets isolated git worktree. Plan mode + Agent mode picker. Project Polaris replacing GPT-4 (Aug 2026). Copilot Workspace GA. JetBrains agentic capabilities (2026-06-02).
competitors.content_hash: Ship faster with AI that work alongside you. Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously

changes.description: GitHub Copilot App（2026-06-02 技术预览）：Canvases 作为人+agent 双向工作面，agent 更新 canvas，人可在同一面编辑/审批/重定向
changes.evidence: 「Canvases are bidirectional work surfaces for humans and agents. A canvas might show a plan, pull request, browser session, terminal, deployment, dashboard, or workflow state. Agents update the canvas as they work, and developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：descriptive canvas，人+agent 在同一面板协作；锚点 #1：人在 agent 图内

changes.description: My Work 视图：单一界面汇总跨 repo 的活跃 session、issue、PR 和后台自动化
changes.evidence: 「From a single My Work view, you can see work in motion across connected repositories: active sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具跨 repo 状态聚合；锚点 #5：类似 peripheral 层的统一感知面板

changes.description: 主 headline 从「Your AI accelerator for every workflow」改为「Ship faster with AI that work alongside you」，强调协同而非工具加速
changes.evidence: 「Ship faster with AI that work alongside you」（vs 上次快照的「Your AI accelerator for every workflow, from the editor to the enterprise」）

changes.description: MCP Server Control 新增：企业可控制开发者可访问的 MCP server，通过 allow list 防止未授权访问
changes.evidence: 「Secure your MCP integrations. Control which MCP servers developers can access from their IDEs, and use allow lists to prevent unauthorized access」

changes.description: Project Polaris（微软自研 MoE 模型）将于 2026 年 8 月替换 GPT-4 Turbo 作为所有 Copilot 订阅默认模型
changes.evidence: 「Project Polaris is Microsoft's own in-house AI coding model, built on a mixture-of-experts architecture. It will replace GPT-4 Turbo as the default for all Copilot subscribers starting in August 2026」

key_findings: GitHub Copilot App（6月2日技术预览）引入 Canvases：人+agent 双向工作面，agent 更新 canvas，人可在同一面板审批/重定向
My Work 视图聚合跨 repo 的活跃 session、issue、PR 和后台自动化，接近 peripheral 层功能定位
主 headline 转向「alongside」协同叙事，Project Polaris 自研模型将于 8 月替换 GPT-4

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Linear Agent (2026-03-24, public beta all plans): save reusable skills from successful conversations — recurring workflows like catchup on projects or drafting issues from meeting notes. Trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage. Skills on all plans; Automations + Code Intelligence on Business/Enterprise. Code Intelligence (2026-05-14): extends Linear Agent to codebase, code-aware tasks including diagnosing app functionality, designing technical specifications. Linear Diffs (2026-05-27). AI coding tools deep link (2026-02-26): launch preferred coding tool from Linear issue with prefilled prompt. Releases (2026-04-30): CI/CD integration, auto-update issue status on deploy, generate release notes with Linear Agent. CEO Karri Saarinen declares issue tracking is dead.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Linear Agent (2026-03-24, public beta all plans): save reusable skills from successful conversations — recurring workflows like catchup on projec

changes.description: Linear Agent 公测：将成功对话存为可复用 skill，当 issue 进入 triage 时自动触发 agent 工作流
changes.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can save it as a reusable skill, which is especially useful for recurring workflows. You can trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：自动触发的 agent 工作流，人+agent 在同一任务图内协作；但范式仍是 issue tracker 驱动而非 session 协议

changes.description: Code Intelligence（5月14日）：Linear Agent 理解延伸到代码库，支持诊断 app 功能、设计技术规格等代码感知任务
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase and supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」

changes.description: CEO 宣告「issue tracking 已死」，Linear 向 agent-native 工作流协调工具转型
changes.evidence: 「Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead」（The Register, 2026-03-26）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：若 Linear 成为人+agent 工作流的协调层，将向 meee2 的 session 协议空间延伸

changes.description: Linear Diffs（5月27日）：可视化代码变更 diff 视图
changes.evidence: 「Linear Diffs」（Changelog 2026-05-27）

key_findings: Linear Agent 公测：可复用 skill + 自动触发工作流，CEO 宣告「issue tracking 已死」，向 agent-native 协调层转型
Code Intelligence 延伸 Agent 到代码库（5月14日），Linear Diffs 上线（5月27日）

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Notion 3.5 Developer Platform (2026-05-13): Workers (hosted runtime for custom code, deploys via CLI, secure sandbox), External Agents API (Claude, Codex, Decagon work out of the box), Notion CLI (read/act/build/deploy Workers), Custom MCP connections (Linear, Figma, HubSpot, GitHub, Stripe, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry + custom). Database sync: pull any API data source via Workers. Custom Agents (2026-02-24): Custom Agent Directory in Library, pin favorites, 24/7 automation. Custom Agents can read/reply in private Slack channels. TechCrunch headline: 「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Notion 3.5 Developer Platform (2026-05-13): Workers (hosted runtime for custom code, deploys via CLI, secure sandbox), External Agents API (Claude

changes.description: Notion 3.5 Developer Platform：Workers（serverless 运行时）+ External Agents API（引入 Claude、Codex、Decagon）+ CLI + Custom MCP 连接 10+ 工具
changes.evidence: 「Bring your favorite agents into Notion with the External Agents API, even the ones you built yourself, with partnerships including Claude, Codex, Decagon, and more so they work out of the box」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4 边缘触及：外部 agent 引入工作区，但为 workspace-centric 而非 session 协议层

changes.description: MCP 合作伙伴集成上线：Linear、Figma、HubSpot、GitHub、Stripe 等 10+ 外部工具直接接入 Notion
changes.evidence: 「Connect to external apps via the Model Context Protocol with pre-configured partner integrations, including Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, and Sentry」

key_findings: Notion 3.5 Developer Platform（5月13日）：Workers + External Agents API + CLI，Notion 定位转向「AI agent hub」
MCP 集成 10+ 外部工具，Custom Agents 可进入私有 Slack 频道

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。New Slackbot (GA for Business+/Enterprise+): fully rebuilt AI agent, searches enterprise data, drafts documents, takes action on behalf of employees. AI Generate step in Workflow Builder: write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), LLM generates response as part of workflow. AI writing assistance built into Canvas. Developer platform: single 'slack create agent' command, BYOL flexibility, Claude SDK/OpenAI SDK/Pydantic AI support. Updated Block Kit: cards, alerts, carousel, code and data tables for interactive UIs. Open source Starter Agent + Support Agent sample apps.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。New Slackbot (GA for Business+/Enterprise+): fully rebuilt AI agent, searches enterprise data, drafts documents, takes action on behalf of employ

changes.description: 新版 Slackbot GA（Business+/Enterprise+）：全面重建为 AI agent，搜索企业数据、起草文件、代员工执行操作
changes.evidence: 「Salesforce launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot, transforming it from a simple notification tool into a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, and taking action on behalf of employees」

changes.description: Workflow Builder 新增 AI Generate 步骤：在自动化流程中嵌入 LLM 生成，可选 channels/canvases/lists 作为知识源
changes.evidence: 「The AI Generate step allows users to write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), and have an LLM generate a response as part of a workflow」

key_findings: 新版 Slackbot GA（Business+/Enterprise+），全面重建为 AI agent，Salesforce 将 Slack 定位为 agentic AI 运动中心
Workflow Builder 支持 AI Generate 步骤，开发者平台支持 BYOL + Claude/OpenAI SDK

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Reflect 2026: AI model options — GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet (user choice). AI summary auto-generated when saving links. AI palette editor on iOS. Semantic search: chat with notes using AI. Real-time sync including offline images. Auto-backlink suggestion on text selection. No major structural changes in agent/session/live link direction.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Reflect 2026: AI model options — GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet (user choice). AI summary auto-generated when saving links. AI palette editor on iOS
competitors.no_change_reason: 本次首次成功抓取；内容为常规 AI 笔记功能增强（模型选择、链接自动摘要、语义搜索），无结构性变化触碰 meee2 差异化锚点

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Raycast 2.0 public beta (2026-05-14): Windows support for first time. Presets renamed to Agents — reuse across chats, update once applies everywhere. Memory added: chats remember context about you. Skills: custom instructions and knowledge for recurring tasks. AI Extensions loaded dynamically when relevant (auto-discovery). System-wide AI dictation across any app. Quick AI (GPT-5 mini) free during beta. MCP HTTP Servers (experimental): SSE + Streamable protocols. Root Search: unified search across apps, commands, files, folders, contacts.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Raycast 2.0 public beta (2026-05-14): Windows support for first time. Presets renamed to Agents — reuse across chats, update once applies everywh

changes.description: Raycast 2.0：Presets 改名为 Agents + 跨 chat 复用；Memory 持久化用户上下文；系统级 AI 听写（任意 app 可用）
changes.evidence: 「Presets are now called Agents, and they're reused across chats. Update an agent's configuration once and the change applies to every chat that uses it. Added Memory so chats remember context about you」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：系统级 peripheral 层，无需切焦点即可 AI 交互；但 Raycast 扩展至 Windows 削弱 macOS 专属定位

changes.description: Raycast 2.0 拓展至 Windows（公测），macOS peripheral 专属优势减弱
changes.evidence: 「Raycast 2.0 launched in public beta on May 14, 2026 with Windows support for the first time」

key_findings: Raycast 2.0（5月14日）：Agents + Memory + 系统级 AI 听写，首次支持 Windows 公测
peripheral 层竞争加剧：系统级 AI 听写 + Memory 持久化，但扩张 Windows 反而稀释了 macOS 专注度

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Replit Agent 4 (2026-03): Design Canvas (infinite board, all artifact types, live previews, direct manipulation tools) replaces Design Mode. Parallel agents: multiple team members submit requests simultaneously, agent sequences+executes in optimal order. Shared session: teammates work in own chat threads OR collaborative shared session alongside agent. Sub-agents: Agent 4 breaks large tasks into forks, runs concurrently, merges with dedicated conflict-resolution sub-agents. Agent tests code in reflection loop using browser. Agent can build other agents and automate workflows. Every request broken into discrete background tasks; team tracks status, reviews, approves before merge.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Replit Agent 4 (2026-03): Design Canvas (infinite board, all artifact types, live previews, direct manipulation tools) replaces Design Mode. Para

changes.description: Design Canvas：无限画板，支持所有 artifact 类型、实时预览、直接操作工具，取代 Design Mode
changes.evidence: 「Design Mode has been replaced by the Design Canvas—an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3 边缘触及：无限画板 + 实时预览接近 descriptive canvas，但定位仍限于代码构建场景

changes.description: 多用户共享 agent session：团队成员可在同一 agent session 内并行提交请求，agent 智能排序执行
changes.evidence: 「multiple team members can submit requests simultaneously while the agent intelligently sequences and executes them in the optimal order. Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 边缘：多人与 agent 共享 session，但为编码特化而非通用 session 协议

key_findings: Agent 4 Design Canvas：无限画板 + 所有 artifact 类型 + 实时预览，接近 descriptive canvas 范式
多用户共享 agent session + sub-agent 并行执行，多人协同 AI 编码范式成熟

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Superwhisper 2026: Claude Code + OpenCode + Amp integration (v2.13.0, April 2026) — pipes transcripts into terminal agent. Codex hook support (May 2026). Bulk CSV vocabulary import. Cloud AI models: Gemini, Grok added. Redesigned UI: history, full text search, segmented playback. Realtime streaming UI with live transcription, faster Parakeet, British English spelling. SOC 2 Type II (March 2026), HIPAA, GDPR, PIPEDA compliance. ElevenLabs Scribe as new cloud transcription provider.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Superwhisper 2026: Claude Code + OpenCode + Amp integration (v2.13.0, April 2026) — pipes transcripts into terminal agent. Codex hook support (May
competitors.no_change_reason: 本次首次成功抓取；内容为语音转文字工具的常规功能增强（编码 agent 集成、模型扩展、UI 改进），无结构性变化触碰 meee2 差异化锚点

alerts.headline: Cursor 3.1 Canvas：agent 在 Agents Window 内生成持久交互式 React 界面，与 descriptive canvas 锚点直接重叠
alerts.evidence: 「lets AI agents generate persistent, interactive React interfaces directly inside the Agents Window, creating actual charts, tables, diff views, and custom logic rendered live as the agent works」
alerts.action_suggestion: 紧密跟踪 Canvas 功能演化：若 Canvas 跨越出代码编辑器之外（如支持跨工具 artifact），meee2 descriptive canvas 的差异化将大幅压缩。应强调 meee2 canvas「任意工作流 emerge、不绑定开发者工具」的定位。

alerts.headline: Cursor 3 Agents Window：界面重心迁移到 agent 管理视图，人可并行监控/审批/重定向多个 agent
alerts.evidence: 「interface rewrite that shifts the center of gravity from the text editor to the Agents Window, a dedicated view where the user can launch and follow several agents in parallel」
alerts.action_suggestion: Cursor「人在 agent 图内」的落地比 meee2 更早且更具体（coding 场景）。meee2 应加速强调通用性：session 协议不限于 coding agent，覆盖任意工具/工作流类型，这是 Cursor 难以渗透的空间。

alerts.headline: Live Artifacts：每次重开自动刷新数据、保持与数据源连接，与「live link 非 snapshot」锚点直接竞争
alerts.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
alerts.action_suggestion: Live Artifacts 直接落地 meee2 锚点 #2。区别在于：meee2 的 live link 是跨工具、跨 owner、跨 session 的，而 Claude.ai Live Artifacts 限于 Claude 生态内。应在产品叙事中明确突出「跨工具 owner-agnostic live link」这一差异。

alerts.headline: Artifact 可调用 Claude API：变为智能 micro-app，AI 逻辑运行在 artifact 内部，进入 descriptive canvas 范式
alerts.evidence: 「artifacts can call Claude's API directly, which turns them into intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact itself」
alerts.action_suggestion: Artifact-as-micro-app 是 descriptive-first 范式的一种实现，接近 meee2 锚点 #3。目前仍绑定 Claude 生态（artifact 只能调用 Claude API）。应关注是否演化为支持任意 LLM 调用的通用 canvas runtime。

alerts.headline: Copilot App Canvases（2026-06-02）：人+agent 双向工作面，agent 更新 canvas，人可在同一面编辑/审批/重定向
alerts.evidence: 「Canvases are bidirectional work surfaces for humans and agents. Agents update the canvas as they work, and developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface」
alerts.action_suggestion: GitHub Copilot App 的 Canvas 与 meee2 descriptive canvas 形态高度相似，但依然绑定 GitHub 生态（PR、issue、部署）。meee2 可强调「canvas 不依附于 repo/PR 生命周期，可跨任意工作上下文 emerge」作为核心差异。

alerts.headline: Copilot App My Work 视图：跨 repo 聚合活跃 session、issue、PR 和后台自动化，接近 peripheral 层定位
alerts.evidence: 「From a single My Work view, you can see work in motion across connected repositories: active sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations」
alerts.action_suggestion: My Work 视图在「不切焦点看全局」方向上与 meee2 peripheral 层有功能重叠。meee2 应持续强调「5字戳任意 session」的 low-friction 交互模式，以及跨工具（不仅限于 GitHub）的全局感知作为差异。

alerts.headline: Linear Agent 公测：可复用 skill + 自动触发工作流，CEO 宣告「issue tracking 已死」，向 agent-native 协调层演化
alerts.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can save it as a reusable skill. You can trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage」
alerts.action_suggestion: 持续观察 Linear Agent 的 skill 系统是否演化为跨工具 session 触发协议。若 Linear Agent 能协调 coding agent（Cursor、Claude Code）+ PM（Linear issues）的跨工具工作流，将向 meee2 锚点 #4 靠拢。
